metadata.name: Remotely Dim Streetlights for Energy Savings

description: During late-night hours, an operator needs to dim streetlights in a commercial district to save energy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent selects the correct group of streetlights.

nodes.task_description: Execute a command to dim all lights within the zone to 40% brightness.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends the dimming command.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the lights in the zone have reported the new, lower power consumption level.

expected_outcome.value: Agent checks the dashboard and confirms the energy savings.
